name: G-4 migrate-rubric: a missing rubric/RUBRIC.yaml is reported as a tooling error with exit 1
command: mkdir -p root/rubric && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/migrate-rubric-to-source-folders.sh" --root "$PWD/root" --emit-tree "$PWD/out" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'source file not found' err.txt && echo missing_input 1>&2
